results.title: With Chabahar Port in limbo, can India still reach Central Asia and Russia?
results.description: India's crucial trade route to Russia and Central Asia is at a critical juncture. US sanctions on Iran's Chabahar port create uncertainty for India's role. India is exploring options to maintain its presence. This development impacts the International North-South Transport Corridor. Analysts believe the corridor can survive but India's influence may diminish.

results.title: RCB Triumphs Over KKR in Thrilling IPL 2026 Encounter
results.description: In a thrilling IPL 2026 match, Royal Challengers Bengaluru triumphed over Kolkata Knight Riders, with Virat Kohli scoring a remarkable century. The game featured a bizarre moment when RCB's Jacob Bethell lost his gold chain on the field. Despite a rain delay, RCB chased down KKR's total with ease, securing their spot at the top of the points table. Discover the key highlights and performances from this exciting encounter.

results.title: What Indian gardeners should plant before the first rains hit
results.description: Gardening enthusiasts in India find pre-monsoon weeks ideal for planting. Warm soil, increasing humidity, and early rains create perfect conditions for young plants to establish strong roots. This period boosts survival chances for vegetables like bhindi, gourds, and chillies, as well as leafy greens and herbs, ensuring a bountiful harvest.

results.title: Suriya's Karuppu Faces Release Day Setback Amid Fan Anticipation
results.description: Suriya's action drama Karuppu faced an unexpected setback on its release day, with special morning shows cancelled across multiple theatres. Despite receiving government approval for early screenings, fans were left disappointed as many had pre-booked tickets and planned celebrations. Speculation suggests financial issues may be the cause of the disruption. Director RJ Balaji expressed his commitment to resolving the situation, while fans took to social media to voice their frustrations. The film, which features Suriya in a dual role alongside Trisha Krishnan, is highly anticipated, and the strong reactions from fans underscore the excitement surrounding its release.

results.title: Metropolis Healthcare rallies after Q4 PAT climbs 75% YoY to Rs 51 cr
results.description: Metropolis Healthcare jumped 4.23% to Rs 571.30 after the company's consolidated net profit rose 74.67% to Rs 50.90 crore on 22.99% increase in revenue from operations to Rs 424.68 crore in Q4 FY26 over Q4 FY25.
